title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Rising Conflict

dialogue.text: Watch out for the "shadow" behind you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: That was close... but too bad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!? Why is Moria over here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: is my shadow, who was just here.

dialogue.text: Kishishi... that makes three of you down.
